synced:
[00:06.49] Call us what we are, toxic from the start
[00:10.11] Can't pretend that I was in the dark
[00:12.23] When you met my friends, didn't even try with them
[00:15.77] I should've known right then
[00:16.85] That you were jealous and possessive
[00:20.02] So manipulatin'
[00:22.82] Honestly, impressive
[00:25.88] You had me participatin'
[00:28.99] Back then, when I was runnin' out of your place
[00:31.90] I said, "I never wanna see your face"
[00:34.63] I meant I couldn't wait to see it again
[00:38.16] We were toxic 'til the end
[00:40.36] Uh-huh, 'cause even when I said it was over
[00:43.19] You heard, "Baby, can you pull me in closer?"
[00:45.82] You were plottin' how to stay in my head
[00:49.68] We were toxic 'til the end
[00:52.48] Ladies and gentlemen, I present to you the ex
[00:57.76] His favorite game is chess, who would ever guess?
[01:01.63] Playin' with the pieces in my chest
[01:03.63] Now he's on the screen and sayin', "Don't leave"
[01:07.04] You stole that line from me
[01:08.37] 'Cause you're just jealous and possessive
[01:11.35] So manipulatin'
[01:14.10] Honestly, impressive
[01:17.29] You had me participatin'
[01:20.23] Back then, when I was runnin' out of your place
[01:23.26] I said, "I never wanna see your face"
[01:26.10] I meant I couldn't wait to see it again
[01:29.77] We were toxic 'til the end
[01:31.78] Uh-huh, 'cause even when I said it was over
[01:34.61] You heard, "Baby, can you pull me in closer?"
[01:37.57] You were plottin' how to stay in my head
[01:41.00] We were toxic 'til the end, end, end
[01:48.75] I can forgive you for all of the things
[01:51.14] For not givin' me back my Tiffany rings
[01:54.15] I'll never forgive you for one thing, my dear
[01:57.07] You wasted my prettiest years
[02:00.47] Back then, when I was runnin' out of your place
[02:03.24] I said, "I never wanna see your face"
[02:06.27] I meant I couldn't wait to see it again
[02:09.67] We were toxic

[02:14.63] You heard, "Baby, can you pull me in closer?"
[02:17.43] You were plottin' how to stay in my head
[02:21.08] We were toxic 'til the end, end, end
[02:26.76] We were toxic 'til the end, end, end
